en: People saying the weirdest things, the craziest things.
ko: 사람들이 진짜 이상한 말, 미친 말을 해.

en: These bloody immigrants, they come over here,
they're up to no good, right?
they need to go back to where they came from.
But why do you hate them so much?
I hate, I'll tell you why I hate them, I'll tell you why.
Because they're not even trying to be British, that's why.
They don't even try to be British, right?
ko: 영국인이 되려고 노력도 안 해, 알지?

en: They come here, they bring their own bloody culture, right?
ko: 여기 와서 자기네 빌어먹을 문화를 들여오고, 알지?

en: try to take over the whole bloody place.
That sounds British to me, I mean.
